steps.t: You should talk to Barathron in the Foothold camp in Udûn to learn more about the riddle he wishes to solve.
You should look for signal flags in the western half of the Udûn basin.
The Nurnhoth slave is lying on the southern edge of the Udûn basin, up atop a wooden structure. You should return to the slave of Nurn you found by th…
